description: User is waiting while the AI moderator screen is displayed with the message 'What's making you hesitate there'.
frame_description: The screen shows an AI moderator interface with a prompt and buttons for 'Open' and 'Repeat the task instructions'.

description: The AI moderator text updates progressively from 'Thank you' to 'Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?'.
frame_description: The central text on the AI moderator screen changes as the session progresses.
